title: This discussion is about proposing a new “Ninja Mode” alternative to the Llama Farm view in Monday.com, complete with themes, animations, and mock‑ups for a feature request.
excerpt:

posts.author: CarrieFleenor (Carrie Fleenor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Introduce a toggle in Board Views or Dashboards that allows users to switch between the existing Llama Farm widget and a new, fun, gamified Ninja Mode with multiple theme variations (Ninja Dojo, Task Shinobi, Ninja Camp, or Stealth Squad).

What are you trying to achieve

The Problem
The Llama Farm widget is delightful and engaging, but it only offers one visual style.

Teams who enjoy gamified productivity may want alternative aesthetics that better reflect their team culture, internal jokes, or brand personality—for example, a recent ninja reference shared in a team discussion.

Providing only one theme limits personalization and reduces novelty over time.

Use Case
Teams using Monday.com for sprints, project management, onboarding, and workflow rituals could boost engagement by selecting a visual theme that matches their team’s energy.

Examples:

Marketing or RevOps teams could adopt Ninja Dojo.
Tech/DevOps groups may love Stealth Squad.
Training teams may prefer Ninja Camp.
Teams with ninja‑related branding or memes can visually reinforce culture.

This improves motivation, morale, and engagement — all aligned to Monday.com’s playful, visual, productivity‑first identity.

The Suggestion
Create a Ninja Mode toggle in the Llama Farm widget that lets
